title: Fizzy Delight
description: A simple Farmer’s Delight addon that adds various customizable drinks to the game
body:
![Mod icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3368f9e8670523948236d748ce657fae2306016b.png)

Fizzy Delight is a simple Farmer's Delight addon that adds new consumables - drinks, syrups, and sodas! It also introduces Lemons that grow on Lemon Trees in your world.

---

## Features
- Lemon Tree: logs, planks, leaves, and lemons
- Natron: Sodium Crystal & Sodium Bicarbonate
- Seltzer Water: gives “Carbonated” effect in water, that slowly pushes you out of water
- Fruit, Berry, and Vegetable Syrups & Sodas - fully JSON-modifiable drinkable items
